TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Adrian_Branch, title = Adrian_Branch, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Adrian_Branch} }

S.FORM: Adrian Branch sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 11, Adrian Branch, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Adrian Branch sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 11, Adrian Branch, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: a*rian βranʦ~ʨħ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, a*rian βranʦ~ʨħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
